reasoning: Your primary limiter is lactate clearance. The last ride showed a steady aerobic effort but lacked intensity to challenge this aspect. We'll focus on over-unders resembling the demands of the Alpine Loop to enhance fatigue resistance by alternating between sweet spot and threshold efforts.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 x (5 minutes at 242-256W / 3 minutes at 201-218W) with 2-minute recovery between sets

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
